title: Consolidate Metrics Page into Single Card Layout
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want the Metrics page to use a single unified card layout instead of separate 'Add Metrics' and 'Metrics' cards, so that the page feels cleaner and less cluttered.
description:
The Metrics page currently has multiple card containers. Consolidate into a single card with one header and one body.

## Changes
1. Remove the separate "Add Metrics" card — merge into the main "Metrics" card
2. Collapse redundant nested DIVs that create unnecessary margin
3. Dark mode dropdown background changed from black to `#111C44`
4. Add `box-shadow: 0px 6px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25)` to dropdowns
5. Fix duplicate "Salesforce" entry in the import dropdown — should read "Import from Salesforce"
6. Move multi-select buttons after the filter icon
7. Adjust metrics column to `col-md-2`
acceptance_criteria: Metrics page uses a single card container with one card-header and card-body
No redundant nested DIVs causing extra margin
Dropdown background uses #111C44 in dark mode instead of black
Dropdowns have box-shadow for visual depth
Import dropdown reads 'Import from Salesforce' (no duplicates)
Multi-select buttons positioned after the filter icon
Page alignment matches other application pages
ux_changes: Metrics page consolidated into a single card layout. Redundant DIVs removed for consistent alignment. Dropdown styling improved with dark mode background color and box shadow. Import dropdown label fixed. Multi-select buttons relocated after filter icon.
implementation_notes: Collapsed redundant card and div wrappers. Applied CSS fixes for dark mode dropdown background (#111C44) and box-shadow. Fixed duplicate Salesforce label. Adjusted grid column width to col-md-2.
comment_summary: Developer consolidated the cards. Product owner provided specific CSS for dark mode dropdown background and box-shadow. Found duplicate Salesforce label and redundant nested DIVs. Multiple rounds of refinement on alignment, button positioning, and column widths.
